inhalation

lines, we moved to preliminary in vivo

studies. The aim of
these experiments was to evaluate if
the

developed NPs were able to exert
their silencing eﬀect
follow-

ing
pulmonary
administration.
To
facilitate
the
study, we
decided to look at an orthotopic model of lung cancer in mice
established with luciferase-expressing cancer cells. siRNAs for
the knock-down of luciferase activity are also readily available.
